spine.label: Assessment
spine.definition: A scored behavioural / competency assessment establishes the working signal.

spine.label: Evidence Collection
spine.definition: Evidence accrues into the longitudinal record (one datapoint per cycle).

spine.label: AI Interpretation
spine.definition: AI interprets signals/competencies into an explainable diagnosis.

spine.label: Intervention
spine.definition: A targeted intervention is delivered for the diagnosed gap.

spine.label: Learning
spine.definition: A personalised learning / development plan is composed and surfaced.

spine.label: Practice
spine.definition: Practice / activities are surfaced for the learner to act on.

spine.label: Reassessment
spine.definition: Interval / exit re-administration of the existing assessment (close-the-loop).

spine.label: Improvement
spine.definition: Improvement is validated against the prior datapoint(s) as a longitudinal trend.

spine.label: Measured Outcome
spine.definition: A realized, MEASURABLE outcome is captured into the canonical outcome ledger.

spine.label: KPI Update
spine.definition: The measured outcome rolls up into the individual / persona / lifecycle / business KPIs.

spine.label: Continuous Optimization
spine.definition: The loop re-enters: KPIs inform the next cycle from the new baseline.

outcome_types.label: Assessment Completion
outcome_types.definition: A subject completes a scored assessment (the entry datapoint of every outcome chain).

outcome_types.label: Diagnosis Delivered
outcome_types.definition: An explainable AI diagnosis is surfaced from the scored signal/competency profile.

outcome_types.label: Recommendation Engagement
outcome_types.definition: A growth recommendation is generated and surfaced for the diagnosed gap.

outcome_types.label: Intervention Uptake
outcome_types.definition: A targeted intervention is delivered (uptake inferred from intervention substrate).
outcome_types.statusNote: Intervention delivery substrate exists; explicit per-subject uptake telemetry is recommendation/intervention-inferred (no separate completion log) — Coverage⟂Adoption.

outcome_types.label: Learning Progress
outcome_types.definition: Movement on the longitudinal record after a learning/practice cycle.

outcome_types.label: Competency / EI Improvement
outcome_types.definition: A measured uplift in a competency / EI dimension vs the baseline.

outcome_types.label: Readiness Uplift
outcome_types.definition: A measured rise in the readiness band over the readiness history.

outcome_types.label: Reassessment Completed
outcome_types.definition: A subject re-administers the assessment (>1 longitudinal datapoint — close-the-loop).
outcome_types.statusNote: Reassessment signal MECHANISM present (getReassessmentSignal); real re-administration volume is ADOPTION-pending (Coverage⟂Adoption, null≠0).

outcome_types.label: Stage Promotion
outcome_types.definition: The subject advances a lifecycle stage (Curiosity→Insight→Growth→Mastery).
outcome_types.statusNote: Promotion is readiness-DERIVED (evidence-gate band) recorded in wc3_stage_progression, not a uniformly enforced gate — Coverage present, ADOPTION usage-driven.

outcome_types.label: Realized Outcome
outcome_types.definition: A realized career/hiring/development outcome (placement, role progression, hire, direction chosen).
outcome_types.statusNote: Canonical ledger present (validation_loop_outcomes via MX-102X + Phase 1.3 capture); realized-outcome volume is the universal adoption-gated tail.

outcome_types.label: Mastery Achievement
outcome_types.definition: A reached-mastery milestone is captured (terminal coded-ladder outcome + loop re-entry).
outcome_types.statusNote: reached_mastery capture MECHANISM present (progression-outcome-capture); realized mastery volume is honest-low/0 (Adoption⟂Coverage, null≠0).

kpi_families.label: Individual KPIs
kpi_families.definition: Per-subject growth measures (readiness score, improvement delta, completion).

kpi_families.label: Persona KPIs
kpi_families.definition: Per-persona success metrics rolled up across subjects of a persona.
kpi_families.statusNote: Persona roll-up via READ-TIME join (capadex_user_profiles.persona ⟂ validation_loop_outcomes); k-anon suppressed; no persona dimension added to the ledger — Coverage present, volume adoption-gated.

kpi_families.label: Lifecycle KPIs
kpi_families.definition: Stage distribution + promotion / progression rates across the coded ladder.

kpi_families.label: Assessment KPIs
kpi_families.definition: Assessment throughput, coverage and reassessment rate.

kpi_families.label: Journey KPIs
kpi_families.definition: Funnel conversion / drop-off / outcome-tail completion across the journey.
kpi_families.statusNote: Journey substrate present (validation_loop_outcomes + journey-tail); conversion KPIs are adoption-gated (real volume) — Coverage⟂Adoption.

kpi_families.label: AI KPIs
kpi_families.statusNote: Diagnosis/recommendation substrate present; acceptance stays honest-null (no per-recommendation acceptance signal) and effectiveness is WIRED via REUSE of the validation-loop calibration mechanism but ABSTAINED (null) until ≥ k_min real prediction+outcome pairs accrue (Confidence axis, never fabricated).

kpi_families.label: Business KPIs
kpi_families.definition: Placement / hiring conversion + commercial outcomes (revenue reported separately).
kpi_families.statusNote: Placement/hiring realized via validation_loop_outcomes; revenue lives in the SEPARATE commerce ledger (capadex_payments) and is NOT composited into outcome KPIs — Coverage present, accuracy/volume adoption-gated.

kpi_families.label: Organizational KPIs
kpi_families.definition: Cohort movement + institute / batch coverage (k-anon aggregate).
kpi_families.statusNote: Real k-anon aggregation (MX-302H); scores masked below k_min, roster always shown.

kpi_families.label: Platform KPIs
kpi_families.definition: Active users / retention / engagement rolled up by the analytics engine.
kpi_families.statusNote: Analytics KPI substrate present (anl_kpi_daily/anl_cohort_analysis); population is adoption-driven (real volume) — Coverage⟂Adoption, null≠0.

lifecycle_rules.label: Curiosity
lifecycle_rules.measurableOutcome: A scored baseline + first AI diagnosis exist (the entry outcome of every chain).
lifecycle_rules.statusNote: Entry → baseline → diagnosis is the most mature outcome segment.

lifecycle_rules.label: Insight
lifecycle_rules.measurableOutcome: A recommendation + learning/intervention plan is generated and acted on.
lifecycle_rules.statusNote: Recommendation + learning + intervention generation is well-supported (reused engines).

lifecycle_rules.label: Growth
lifecycle_rules.measurableOutcome: A reassessment validates improvement vs the baseline; a realized outcome is captured.
lifecycle_rules.statusNote: Reassessment + improvement MECHANISM present (Phase 1.3 reuse + longitudinal trend); validation is ADOPTION-pending (>1 non-demo datapoint). Coverage⟂Adoption⟂Confidence never composited.

lifecycle_rules.label: Mastery
lifecycle_rules.measurableOutcome: A reached-mastery + realized outcome is captured; the optimization loop re-enters.
lifecycle_rules.statusNote: reached_mastery + exit-eligibility MECHANISM present (progression-outcome-capture + getReassessmentSignal). Continuous re-entry cadence is adoption-gated; realized mastery volume honest-low/0 (Adoption⟂Coverage, null≠0).

paths.label: Student → Career Growth
paths.aiInterpretation: Behavioural signal → concern routing + competency diagnosis (PIL runtime guidance).
paths.recommendationEffectiveness: Recommendation substrate present (development_recommendations); calibrated effectiveness abstained until volume (Confidence axis, honest-null).
paths.interventionEffectiveness: Concern-targeted interventions (capadex_interventions); uptake inferred, effectiveness abstained.
paths.realizedOutcome: Career direction chosen / measurable growth progressed; realized-outcome tail adoption-gated.
paths.successMetrics: Assessment completion; recommendation engagement; positive re-measure movement.
paths.statusNote: Strong front-half (assessment→diagnose→recommend→learn→intervene). Measured-outcome + KPI roll-up MECHANISM present; per-journey realized-outcome volume is ADOPTION-pending (Coverage⟂Adoption, null≠0).

paths.label: Fresher → Placement Readiness
paths.aiInterpretation: Competency + readiness diagnosis; role-DNA crosswalk for fit.
paths.recommendationEffectiveness: Launchpad next-steps + placement matching; effectiveness measured as readiness uplift + application rate (volume-gated).
paths.interventionEffectiveness: Readiness-gap interventions + curated practice; effectiveness via readiness-band movement.
paths.successMetrics: Launchpad completion; readiness uplift; application + placement rate.
paths.statusNote: Launchpad + placement readiness loop is live; realized placement-outcome capture is the universal adoption-gated tail (Adoption⟂Coverage).

paths.label: Professional → Role Progression
paths.recommendationEffectiveness: Progression-aware growth plan; effectiveness via validated improvement vs baseline (abstained calibration until volume).
paths.interventionEffectiveness: Competency-gap interventions + reinforcement; effectiveness via competency-band movement.
paths.realizedOutcome: Role progression / promotion; adoption-gated realized-outcome tail.
paths.successMetrics: Re-run rate; positive-movement rate; progression cadence.
paths.statusNote: Reaches the FULL loop incl. reassessment→improvement→measured-outcome→KPI as a MECHANISM, but promotion is DERIVED (not uniformly gated — a progression-engine residual) and validation is ADOPTION-pending (Coverage⟂Adoption⟂Confidence).

paths.label: Employee → Competency / EI Development
paths.recommendationEffectiveness: Competency-gap → development recommendation; effectiveness via EI/competency delta (abstained calibration).
paths.interventionEffectiveness: EI / competency interventions; effectiveness via ei_profile_snapshots delta.
paths.realizedOutcome: Competency uplift; EI development; adoption-gated outcome tail.
paths.successMetrics: Baseline coverage; competency movement; EI delta.
paths.statusNote: Competency + EI development diagnosis is well-supported (mei + intervention engines); realized development-outcome capture is the universal adoption-gated tail (Adoption⟂Coverage).

paths.label: HR / Recruiter → Hiring Outcome
paths.recommendationEffectiveness: Talent-match ranking → interview → hire decision support; calibration accrues at k_min=30 (Brier/ECE abstain below).
paths.interventionEffectiveness: Funnel-stage prompts (recruiter-facing); effectiveness via funnel conversion + time-to-decision.
paths.successMetrics: Funnel conversion; time-to-decision; match quality; calibration (k≥30).
paths.statusNote: The 9-stage hiring funnel is the most complete realized-outcome family. Realized hiring-outcome capture exists; adoption + calibration reported separately (Adoption⟂Coverage; Brier/ECE abstain <k_min=30).

paths.label: Institute Admin → Cohort Outcome
paths.recommendationEffectiveness: Cohort-level act recommendations (k-gated); effectiveness via cohort movement.
paths.successMetrics: Cohort coverage; cohort movement; placement rate.
paths.statusNote: Real k-anon aggregation (MX-302H) — scores masked below k_min, roster always shown. Realized cohort-outcome tail adoption-gated.

paths.label: Parent → Support Child Outcome
paths.aiInterpretation: Child progress framing via consent-scoped view.
paths.recommendationEffectiveness: Support-action recommendations (journey-tail engine); effectiveness via child positive movement.
paths.interventionEffectiveness: Parent support actions reinforcing the child loop (jt_parent_support_actions); milestone fires into the outcome tail.
paths.realizedOutcome: Support actions logged → child growth-loop continuation (captureJourneyTailMilestone).
paths.successMetrics: Consent rate; support-action adoption; child positive movement.
paths.statusNote: Support-action substrate EXISTS (journeyTailCompletion: jt_parent_support_actions, fail-closed on child ownership) and a completed action fires a journey-tail milestone into the universal outcome tail (longitudinalOutcomeCapture-gated). Residual is ADOPTION (real support-action volume — Coverage⟂Adoption, null≠0).

paths.label: Mentor / Coach → Mentee Outcome
paths.recommendationEffectiveness: Engagement / guidance recommendations (journey-tail engine); effectiveness via mentee movement.
paths.interventionEffectiveness: Mentor engagement milestones reinforcing the mentee loop (jt_mentor_engagements); milestone fires into the outcome tail.
paths.successMetrics: Match rate; engagement cadence; mentee movement.
paths.statusNote: Engagement substrate EXISTS (journeyTailCompletion: jt_mentor_engagements, gated BOTH directions via mentor_bookings to avoid IDOR) and a milestone fires into the universal outcome tail (longitudinalOutcomeCapture-gated). Residual is ADOPTION (real engagement volume — Coverage⟂Adoption, null≠0).

paths.label: Faculty → Batch Outcome
paths.recommendationEffectiveness: Faculty-scoped act recommendations (k-gated); effectiveness via batch movement.
paths.interventionEffectiveness: Batch-level intervention prompts (k≥k_min, batch-confined); effectiveness aggregate-only.
paths.statusNote: Faculty batch-confined outcome view EXISTS (institutional-intelligence, role-scoped batch-confined access; MX-302H). Aggregate-only — no per-individual outcome. Adoption-gated cohort volume (Coverage⟂Adoption).

decisions.rationale: Realized outcomes are captured by EXISTING engines (outcome-intelligence-engine → validation_loop_outcomes, Phase-1.3 progression-outcome-capture); KPIs are computed by the EXISTING enterprise-analytics + benchmark + mei/employability engines. This phase adds ONE read-only composer/registry, never a parallel outcome or KPI engine.

KPI families roll up over the existing anl_kpi_daily/anl_cohort_analysis/anl_benchmark_snapshot substrate + benchmark/mei/employability engines. No second KPI engine, no new KPI table. Population is adoption-driven (Coverage⟂Adoption, null≠0).

The recommendation→outcome / intervention→outcome effectiveness link is WIRED via REUSE of the EXISTING validation-loop calibration mechanism (recordValidationOutcome captures predicted_prob_at_decision; calibrationFromRows/toCalibrationPairs calibrate non-demo prediction+outcome rows with a k_min gate) — zero new engine/table/DDL. The calibrated effectiveness_rate is honestly ABSTAINED (null) while status is cold_start/provisional and lights up ONLY at calibrated (≥ k_min real pairs); this is the Confidence axis, distinct from Coverage. Never fabricate a rate before the data exists.

Realized outcomes write to the EXISTING canonical ledger (validation_loop_outcomes) via reuse of MX-102X + Phase-1.3 capture, gated by longitudinalOutcomeCapture → byte-identical OFF. No new outcome table, no new DDL.

Revenue lives in the SEPARATE commerce ledger (capadex_payments) and is reported on its own axis — never composited into outcome/growth KPIs. Business KPIs here mean placement/hiring realized outcomes, not money.

coverage.statusNote: Strong front-half (assessment→diagnose→recommend→learn→intervene). Measured-outcome + KPI roll-up MECHANISM present; per-journey realized-outcome volume is ADOPTION-pending (Coverage⟂Adoption, null≠0).

coverage.statusNote: Faculty batch-confined outcome view EXISTS (institutional-intelligence, role-scoped batch-confined access; MX-302H). Aggregate-only — no per-individual outcome. Adoption-gated cohort volume (Coverage⟂Adoption).

outcome_type_coverage.statusNote: Intervention delivery substrate exists; explicit per-subject uptake telemetry is recommendation/intervention-inferred (no separate completion log) — Coverage⟂Adoption.

outcome_type_coverage.label: Reassessment Completed
outcome_type_coverage.statusNote: Reassessment signal MECHANISM present (getReassessmentSignal); real re-administration volume is ADOPTION-pending (Coverage⟂Adoption, null≠0).

outcome_type_coverage.label: Stage Promotion
outcome_type_coverage.statusNote: Promotion is readiness-DERIVED (evidence-gate band) recorded in wc3_stage_progression, not a uniformly enforced gate — Coverage present, ADOPTION usage-driven.

outcome_type_coverage.label: Realized Outcome
outcome_type_coverage.statusNote: Canonical ledger present (validation_loop_outcomes via MX-102X + Phase 1.3 capture); realized-outcome volume is the universal adoption-gated tail.

outcome_type_coverage.label: Mastery Achievement
outcome_type_coverage.statusNote: reached_mastery capture MECHANISM present (progression-outcome-capture); realized mastery volume is honest-low/0 (Adoption⟂Coverage, null≠0).

kpi_coverage.statusNote: Persona roll-up via READ-TIME join (capadex_user_profiles.persona ⟂ validation_loop_outcomes); k-anon suppressed; no persona dimension added to the ledger — Coverage present, volume adoption-gated.

kpi_coverage.statusNote: Journey substrate present (validation_loop_outcomes + journey-tail); conversion KPIs are adoption-gated (real volume) — Coverage⟂Adoption.

recommendation.note: Substrate counts are MEASURED (Coverage); per-channel effectiveness_rate stays null because the decision-time prediction is recorded loop-level (validation_loop_outcomes), not per recommendation/intervention row — see the loop-level `calibration` block. Confidence⟂Coverage, null≠0.

intervention.note: Substrate counts are MEASURED (Coverage); per-channel effectiveness_rate stays null because the decision-time prediction is recorded loop-level (validation_loop_outcomes), not per recommendation/intervention row — see the loop-level `calibration` block. Confidence⟂Coverage, null≠0.

calibration.note: Loop-level effectiveness READ through the EXISTING validation-loop calibration mechanism (recordValidationOutcome captures predicted_prob_at_decision; calibrationFromRows calibrates with a k_min gate). status cold_start/provisional → effectiveness_rate null (Confidence axis, abstained, NEVER fabricated); flips to calibrated + a real rate only when ≥ k_min non-demo prediction+outcome pairs accrue. No engine invoked; zero DDL.

effectiveness.note: Recommendation→outcome and intervention→outcome EFFECTIVENESS. The substrate (recommendations, interventions, realized outcomes) is MEASURED (Coverage); loop-level calibrated effectiveness is WIRED via REUSE of the validation-loop calibration mechanism (`calibration` block) and abstains honestly (cold_start, rate null) until ≥ k_min real prediction+outcome pairs accrue — Confidence axis, null≠0, never fabricated. Demo subjects excluded. No engine is invoked; zero DDL.

resolved_gaps.title: Universal realized-outcome capture into the canonical ledger
resolved_gaps.closure: PRESENT via REUSE (MX-102X + Phase 1.3): outcome-intelligence-engine + captureProgressionOutcome/captureJourneyTailMilestone write realized outcomes (placement/hire/progression/mastery/engagement) into validation_loop_outcomes. Gated by longitudinalOutcomeCapture → byte-identical OFF. No new engine/table/DDL.
resolved_gaps.residual: ADOPTION: real realized-outcome volume is usage-driven (honest-low/0; reported by composeOutcomeAdoption — Adoption⟂Coverage, null≠0).

resolved_gaps.title: KPI computation substrate (enterprise analytics + benchmark + scoring)
resolved_gaps.closure: PRESENT via REUSE: the existing enterprise-analytics (anl_kpi_daily/anl_cohort_analysis/anl_benchmark_snapshot) + benchmark/mei/employability scoring engines compute the 10 KPI families. The composer READS coverage of this substrate; it never re-computes a KPI or builds a second KPI engine.
resolved_gaps.residual: ADOPTION: KPI population is usage-driven (Coverage⟂Adoption, null≠0).

resolved_gaps.title: Longitudinal improvement-validation substrate
resolved_gaps.closure: PRESENT via REUSE: longitudinal-memory + wc3 longitudinal-foundation record the trend that validates improvement vs baseline (the measured-outcome input). The composer READS it, never re-derives.
resolved_gaps.residual: CONFIDENCE + ADOPTION: improvement is measurable once >1 non-demo datapoint exists; calibrated accuracy is abstained by design (Coverage⟂Confidence⟂Adoption, null≠0).

resolved_gaps.title: Recommendation/intervention → outcome effectiveness is WIRED to the calibration mechanism (formerly GAP-O1)
resolved_gaps.closure: CLOSED via REUSE (no new engine/table/DDL): composeEffectiveness now READS the EXISTING validation-loop calibration mechanism — recordValidationOutcome captures the decision-time prediction (predicted_prob_at_decision); calibrationFromRows/toCalibrationPairs turn non-demo prediction+outcome rows into a calibrated effectiveness block with a k_min gate. The link is end-to-end: when ≥ k_min real pairs accrue, status flips to calibrated and effectiveness_rate lights up automatically. Demo excluded; nothing fabricated.
resolved_gaps.residual: CONFIDENCE: until ≥ k_min real non-demo prediction+outcome pairs accrue the status is cold_start/provisional and effectiveness_rate stays null (abstained, NEVER fabricated). This is a Confidence/Adoption axis — reported via the `calibration` block, never a gap. Coverage⟂Confidence⟂Adoption, null≠0.

resolved_gaps.title: Per-persona KPI roll-up is a deliberate zero-DDL read-time join — an ARCHITECTURE axis, not a gap (formerly GAP-O2)
resolved_gaps.closure: RECLASSIFIED (not an engineering defect): persona KPIs are computed by JOINING validation_loop_outcomes to capadex_user_profiles.persona at READ time. This is a deliberate zero-DDL / byte-identical-OFF choice — Coverage IS present; "closing" it would mean adding a persisted persona column (DDL), which would VIOLATE this phase's contract. It is therefore an architecture axis, reported with k≥k_min masking, never an open gap.
resolved_gaps.residual: ARCHITECTURE (optional/future): if a persisted persona dimension is ever required, REUSE the existing profile substrate via a materialized read-model — no change to the canonical ledger, no DDL in this phase.

resolved_gaps.title: Platform / organizational KPI population is an ADOPTION axis, not a gap (formerly GAP-O3)
resolved_gaps.closure: RECLASSIFIED (not an engineering defect): platform/organizational KPI families roll up over anl_kpi_daily/anl_cohort_analysis. The substrate + computing engine ALREADY exist (Coverage present); values are honest-low/0 ONLY because real usage volume is low. Forcing them non-zero would mean seeding fabricated data. It is therefore an Adoption axis, reported via composeOutcomeAdoption, never an open gap.
resolved_gaps.residual: ADOPTION: as real usage accrues, the EXISTING enterprise-analytics engine populates the KPI substrate — no new engine required (Coverage⟂Adoption, null≠0; never fabricated).

decisions.rationale: Realized outcomes are captured by EXISTING engines (outcome-intelligence-engine → validation_loop_outcomes, Phase-1.3 progression-outcome-capture); KPIs are computed by the EXISTING enterprise-analytics + benchmark + mei/employability engines. This phase adds ONE read-only composer/registry, never a parallel outcome or KPI engine.

KPI families roll up over the existing anl_kpi_daily/anl_cohort_analysis/anl_benchmark_snapshot substrate + benchmark/mei/employability engines. No second KPI engine, no new KPI table. Population is adoption-driven (Coverage⟂Adoption, null≠0).

The recommendation→outcome / intervention→outcome effectiveness link is WIRED via REUSE of the EXISTING validation-loop calibration mechanism (recordValidationOutcome captures predicted_prob_at_decision; calibrationFromRows/toCalibrationPairs calibrate non-demo prediction+outcome rows with a k_min gate) — zero new engine/table/DDL. The calibrated effectiveness_rate is honestly ABSTAINED (null) while status is cold_start/provisional and lights up ONLY at calibrated (≥ k_min real pairs); this is the Confidence axis, distinct from Coverage. Never fabricate a rate before the data exists.

Realized outcomes write to the EXISTING canonical ledger (validation_loop_outcomes) via reuse of MX-102X + Phase-1.3 capture, gated by longitudinalOutcomeCapture → byte-identical OFF. No new outcome table, no new DDL.

Revenue lives in the SEPARATE commerce ledger (capadex_payments) and is reported on its own axis — never composited into outcome/growth KPIs. Business KPIs here mean placement/hiring realized outcomes, not money.

enterprise_ready.note: ONE canonical Outcome & KPI Model answers "assessment → intervention → MEASURABLE OUTCOME → KPI": a FROZEN 12-step outcome spine (Assessment→Evidence→AI→Recommend→Intervene→Learn→Practice→Reassess→Improve→Measured-Outcome→KPI-Update→Continuous-Optimization), 11 outcome-tracking types, 10 KPI families, four per-lifecycle-stage outcome rules and a per-persona path register — every field mapped to the eight outcome/KPI axes and verified against the live repo. The chain is mechanism-complete via REUSE-before-build: MX-102X outcome-intelligence + Phase-1.3 progression-outcome-capture write realized outcomes into validation_loop_outcomes; the existing enterprise-analytics + benchmark + mei/employability engines compute the KPI families. This phase adds ONE read-only composer/registry + ZERO new outcome/KPI logic + ZERO schema. OPEN engineering gaps = 0: the recommendation/intervention→outcome effectiveness link is WIRED via REUSE of the existing validation-loop calibration mechanism (formerly GAP-O1 — now mechanism-closed); the per-persona KPI roll-up is a deliberate zero-DDL read-time join (an ARCHITECTURE axis, formerly GAP-O2) and platform/organizational KPI population is usage-driven (an ADOPTION axis, formerly GAP-O3) — both reported on their own axes, NEVER as gaps. The dominant remaining axes are CONFIDENCE (calibration abstained until ≥ k_min real prediction+outcome pairs accrue) and ADOPTION (real outcome/KPI volume, currently honest-low/0, reported SEPARATELY) — usage/data axes, NOT gaps. The verdict stays STRUCTURAL (engineering complete via reuse; adoption/confidence are data-driven and never fabricated). Coverage⟂Confidence⟂Outcome⟂Adoption are reported separately and never composited; null≠0.

adoption.note: ADOPTION axis only — exercise of the (reuse-instrumented) assessment→outcome→KPI loop. SEPARATE from Coverage; never composited. null = unreadable, 0 = measured-empty. Demo subjects excluded. Capture is gated by longitudinalOutcomeCapture; KPI population by the enterprise-analytics engine — this phase builds NO new outcome/KPI machinery.

persona_linkage.note: Persona⟂Outcome linkage validated by a READ-TIME join (no persona column added, zero DDL). Per-persona counts below k_min are suppressed (masked) for anonymity. linkage_present:false means the join was unreadable, NOT that outcomes are zero (null≠0). Coverage⟂Outcome⟂Confidence never composited.
